name: generate_image
description: Generate an image from a text prompt using Stable Diffusion 3 (SD3). Provide a detailed text description and the model will produce a high-quality image. Supports negative prompts to exclude unwanted elements, multiple aspect ratios, and different output formats. The request must be sent as multipart/form-data.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Text description of the image to generate (max 10000 characters). Be specific and detailed for best results.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Generation mode: 'text-to-image' (default). Set to 'image-to-image' when providing a source image.

parameters.name: negative_prompt
parameters.description: Text describing what to exclude from the image (e.g. 'blurry, low quality, distorted').

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: Random seed for reproducible generation (0 to 4294967294). Omit for random.

body.prompt: A futuristic cityscape at sunset with flying cars, neon-lit skyscrapers, and holographic billboards, cyberpunk style, highly detailed, dramatic lighting
body.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, distorted faces, text, watermark

response_example.body: (binary image data in the requested format - Content-Type header indicates format)
